cli-command-ux.title: CLI Command UX
cli-command-ux.intent: Find mature CLIs with clear command trees, discoverable help, plugin-like extension points, and strong terminal ergonomics.
tokens: find mature clis with clear command trees discoverable help plugin like extension points and strong terminal ergonomics

api-test-runner.title: API Test Runner
api-test-runner.intent: Find projects that run API tests, collections, suites, or browser/API automation with reproducible reports.
tokens: find projects that run api tests collections suites or browser api automation with reproducible reports

workflow-orchestration.title: Workflow Orchestration
workflow-orchestration.intent: Find projects that model, schedule, execute, and report multi-step workflows or automation graphs.
tokens: find projects that model schedule execute and report multi step workflows or automation graphs

evidence-diagnosis.title: Evidence Diagnosis
evidence-diagnosis.intent: Find projects that turn logs, traces, reports, or execution artifacts into failure evidence and root-cause hints.
tokens: find projects that turn logs traces reports or execution artifacts into failure evidence and root cause hints

quality-gates.title: Quality Gates
quality-gates.intent: Find projects that gate releases or CI runs with quality reports, coverage, policy checks, and actionable summaries.
tokens: find projects that gate releases or ci runs with quality reports coverage policy checks and actionable summaries

github-radar-generation.title: GitHub Radar Generation
github-radar-generation.intent: Find projects that continuously generate GitHub rankings, star histories, or static indexes from GitHub metadata.
tokens: find projects that continuously generate github rankings star histories or static indexes from github metadata

SigNoz/signoz.name: signoz
SigNoz/signoz.description: SigNoz is an open-source, OpenTelemetry-native observability platform for your team and their AI agents. Get logs, metrics, and traces in one tool with features like APM, distributed tracing, log management, infra monitoring, etc. Combined with SigNoz MCP and a native AI teammate (in SigNoz Cloud) it helps you build more resilient apps.

terramate-io/terramate.name: terramate
terramate-io/terramate.description: Open-source Infrastructure as Code (IaC) orchestration platform: GitOps workflows, orchestration, code generation, observability, drift detection, asset management, policies, Slack notifications, and more. Integrates with Terraform, OpenTofu, Terragrunt, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI/CD, BitBucket Pipelines, and any other CI/CD platform.
